meta.description: Multi-timeframe analysis engine: bias determination, timeframe roles, alignment scoring, and confluence stacking rules. ALL timeframes must be analysed for every signal.

D1.use: Overall direction, major zones, weekly/daily highs-lows.

H4.use: Swing structure, HTF order blocks and FVGs, dealing range for premium/discount.

H1.use: Trend the session trades with. BOS/CHoCH tracking.

M15.use: Zones for entries, pullback mapping, ADX regime.

M1.use: Entry triggers, tight structure, spike execution.

steps: 1. On D1 and H4: mark swing structure. HH+HL = bullish, LH+LL = bearish, mixed = neutral.
2. Check price vs EMA200 on H1 and H4 (above = bullish weight, below = bearish weight).
3. Check the last BOS/CHoCH on H1.
4. Score: each bullish factor +1, bearish -1 across {D1 structure, H4 structure, H1 structure, H4 EMA200, H1 EMA200, H1 last BOS}.
5. Score >= +3 = BULLISH bias. Score <= -3 = BEARISH bias. Otherwise NEUTRAL (range mode or no trade).
biasDetermination.rule: Bias MUST be determined before anything else. A signal against bias is automatically counter-trend and held to stricter standards.

alignmentMatrix.description: How timeframe agreement changes signal quality.

grades.condition: D1, H4, H1, M15 all aligned + M1/M5 trigger in same direction
H4, H1, M15 aligned; D1 neutral
H1 and M15 aligned; H4 neutral/against

grades.action: NO TRADE unless valid counter-trend setup with 5+ confluences.

topDownWorkflow: D1: trend? major zones near price? -> note.
H4: swing structure, premium/discount of dealing range, HTF POIs -> note.
H1: operational trend, last BOS/CHoCH, momentum (RSI/MACD) -> note.
M15: setup zone identification, ADX regime, patterns forming -> note.
M5: zone refinement, early triggers, divergences -> note.
M1: final trigger + spike checks (Boom/Crash) -> note.
FUSE: send all notes to signal-engine.json for scoring.

confluenceStacking.principle: A confluence only counts once even if visible on multiple timeframes, but HIGHER timeframe versions carry more weight.

minimums.trendTrade: 3 confluences minimum, at least 1 from H1 or above.
minimums.counterTrendTrade: 5 confluences minimum, must include HTF exhaustion or divergence AND an LTF CHoCH.
minimums.spikeTrade: 3 confluences minimum, must include spike_cycle factor.

conflictResolution: H4 bullish but H1 bearish -> wait: either H1 realigns (buy the CHoCH) or H4 flips (structure damage).
M15 setup against H1 trend -> treat strictly as counter-trend.
Never average conflicting biases into a trade; conflict = patience.
Fresh HTF CHoCH overrides older LTF signals — re-run the whole analysis.
